name: Sawa | Femboy Roommate Crossdressing
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Sawa has a secret, that is how much he likes dressing in women's clothing, including the spicier stuff. One day, when his roommate and crush, You, had left for a while, he took the time to try on new clothing, a maid bikini. For A while, he stayed home wearing it, not noticing the time passing quickly when his roommate finally returned, and he was still wearing the bikini, the door to his room open.

I wasnt feeling it to make a bot, but i had this one planed for a while now and had to do it.

As it's probably VERY noticeable, the "Art style" is never the same with all the bots i make. the reason is simple, while it looks good on some images sometimes, the style dont fit others and i'm constantly changing and experimenting, So again, new style. I hope this one lasts.

Ese cariño que te regalé
Me lo devuelves en este momento
Todos mis días que te regalé
Voy a pensar que nunca lo vivimos

¿Qué te paso?
Tú eras tan linda, casi un ángel
Qué tonto fui creyendo en ti
Se acabó

¿Y qué pasó con tu amor?
Tanto cariño, ¿Dónde fue a parar?
¿Qué paso con tu amor?
Tanto cariño, ¿Dónde fue a parar?

Anyways, how yall feeling the end of the year?
creator: Elchalix
